bio: Saeed Mohsen was an engineer and one of the three co-founders of the [Mojahedin-e Khalq](/orgs/mojahedin-e-khalq), established on 6 September 1965 alongside [Mohammad Hanifnejad](/people/mohammad-hanifnejad) and [Ali-Asghar Badizadegan](/people/ali-asghar-badizadegan). A former member of the Freedom Movement, he helped build the MEK's early organizational structure. He was arrested by SAVAK in 1971 and executed on 25 May 1972.
editorial_notes: Executed by Shah's regime. Exact birth year uncertain.
